role_obsolescence_source: WEF Future of Jobs 2025, Gartner Customer Service Automation Report 2025

role_replacement_technology: Robotic picking systems, autonomous mobile robots (AMR)
role_reskilling_path: Warehouse automation technician, inventory system operator

role_obsolescence_reason: Complex complaint handling and escalation still requires human judgment — but AI co-pilot tools will handle 40–50% of L2 volume, reducing headcount need rather than eliminating the role entirely.
role_reskilling_path: Customer Service L3 (team lead / QA) or Internal Mobility to Operations Supervisor
